title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use Ollama models as LLM or chat backends in chains, agents, and RAG pipelines.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama (ChatGPT-style interface): chat history, model management, multi-user, dark mode.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; offers synchronous & asynchronous APIs, streaming, and Kotlin coroutines.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Unofficial Rust crate providing typed async bindings to Ollama’s REST API with tokio/hyper.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS Code extension that adds a private Copilot powered by any Ollama model; inline autocomplete & chat sidebar.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight cross-platform desktop GUI (Tauri + Rust) for chatting with Ollama models.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack 2.x integration to use Ollama models as generators or chatters in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-n8n-node
summary: n8n community node that lets you call Ollama models inside no-code workflows (chat, generate, embed).

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for deploying Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and ingress.

title: ollama-docker-compose
summary: Docker-compose stack bundling Ollama + Open-WebUI + GPU runtime for one-command local deployment.

title: ollama-models
summary: Official registry of 100+ quantized models (Llama 3, Phi-3, Mistral, CodeLlama, etc.) ready to pull.

title: ollama-reddit
summary: Active subreddit for Ollama users: model requests, troubleshooting, showcase, and feature discussion.

title: ollama-hnswlib-rag
summary: Minimal Python RAG example using Ollama for generation and hnswlib for local vector search.

title: ollama-modal
summary: Run Ollama on Modal serverless GPUs: deploy models as autoscaling endpoints with a single command.

title: ollama-dotnet
summary: Unofficial .NET SDK for Ollama supporting .NET 6+ with async enumerable streaming and DI-friendly clients.
